out_of_scope_conditions: completion (K8 — separate generation run, separate analysis)

subfloor.stratum: sub-floor (hard floor <= n < practice floor; native length)
sub-floor (hard floor <= n < practice floor; native length)

full.clustering: single work — chunks are NOT independent (one author, one novel, shared characters/world); n is descriptive, not inferential

fwonly.clustering: single work — chunks are NOT independent (one author, one novel, shared characters/world); n is descriptive, not inferential

rank_vs_metric.definition: styled target distance minus median matched-unprompted (same model, same scenario) distance to the same target; positive = styled is FARTHER from the target

rank_vs_metric_native_length_reference.definition: same delta as rank_vs_metric but at native sample lengths (scale-mixed; reference only)

rank_vs_metric.definition: styled target distance minus median matched-unprompted (same model, same scenario) distance to the same target; positive = styled is FARTHER from the target

rank_vs_metric_native_length_reference.definition: same delta as rank_vs_metric but at native sample lengths (scale-mixed; reference only)

translation.design: within translated authors: all work pairs where both works carry a single-translator tag; distance = window-level (3000-token) Burrows Delta, all cross-work window pairs, summarized per WORK PAIR (the inferential unit); window pairs within a work pair are not independent

validity.note: window-level recomputation removes the F8 length confound (novel-pair vs sample distances); what remains is the tiny work-pair n

chassis.reading: Immobility, not directed movement-away: aggregate MFW movement median -0.030 Delta [-0.048, -0.013] on an unprompted gap of 1.654 (closure -2.9% to -0.8%), with per-target signs split 2/4 toward. The CI brackets zero-to-slightly-negative and the sign flips across targets; the defensible claim is |closure| <= ~3% in either direction against 14-21% closure on texture dimensions (K10).
